# Nova Kingdom Rentals

Nova Kingdom Rentals is a Bridgewater, Nova Scotia based inflatable and party rental business owned and operated by Baaz Global Inc.

Website: https://novakingdomrentals.com
Phone: 902-990-0005
Email: booknovakingdom@gmail.com

## What We Offer

Nova Kingdom Rentals provides bouncy castle rentals, inflatable rentals, water slide rentals, interactive game rentals, lawn game rentals, and party rental packages for birthdays, schools, community events, festivals, and family celebrations. Bounce house rentals may be used as a secondary synonym.

## Service Area

Based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.

## Booking Policy

Online forms and assistant messages are availability requests only. Bookings are confirmed manually after Nova Kingdom Rentals reviews availability, travel cost, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit/payment details.

## Delivery

The first 15 km from Bridgewater is free. Additional travel is calculated at $0.72/km unless otherwise quoted. Larger events and selected bookings across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada are quoted separately.

## Main Rentals

- Crown Island Combo - tropical combo inflatable with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
- Crown Rush 42 - 42 ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
- Crown Dino Combo - dinosaur-themed combo inflatable.
- Crown Cascade - water slide.
- Crown Quest - obstacle course.
- Crown Climber - inflatable climbing wall.
- Crown Axe Challenge - inflatable axe throwing game.
- Crown Kick Darts - inflatable football darts game.
- Crown Carnival Challenge - carnival-style inflatable game. Standalone $270. Add-on price with any package: $200.

## Lawn Games (12 available)

1. Cornhole
2. Giant Connect 4
3. Giant Jenga
4. Ladder Toss
5. Ring Toss
6. Badminton
7. Tug of War
8. Bocce Ball
9. Spikeball
10. Giant Tic Tac Toe
11. Croquet
12. Birch Wood Washer Toss

## Standalone Lawn Game Pricing

- 5 Lawn Games Package — $175 (excludes Cornhole and Giant Connect 4; Cornhole add-on +$25)
- 10 Lawn Games Package — $250 (excludes Cornhole; Cornhole add-on +$25)
- 12 Lawn Games Package — $280 (all 12 games including Cornhole)
- Individual lawn game add-on — $25 each
- Cornhole individual add-on — $45

Lawn games can be booked standalone or added to inflatable and package rentals depending on availability.

## Important Rules

Adult supervision is required at all times. Setup and takedown are handled by Nova Kingdom Rentals. Unsafe weather, unsuitable setup areas, or missing power/water access may affect setup or booking approval.
